CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2026 Continued To Sep-02-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-13-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Defendant The Regents of the University of California's demurrer to the First Amended Complaint ("FAC") is SUSTAINED WITH 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND.

(see word minutes for full details)

A proposed order is submitted for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
